---
name: Share practitioner experience
about: You've built or managed a process at a startup — share what you know. This is the most valuable kind of contribution.
title: "[EXPERIENCE] {process} at {stage} — {your name or initials}"
labels: practitioner-experience
assignees: aksie
---

Thanks for contributing. You can fill this in as loosely or as precisely as you like — free text is fine. A maintainer will convert it into the right format.

**Who are you?** *(optional — anonymous is fine)*
<!-- Name, role, or just context: "bootstrapped SaaS, 3-15 people" -->


**Which process and company stage does this cover?**
<!-- Process: e.g. office and facilities, hiring, financial ops, invoicing, strategy...
     Stage: Foundation (1-5 people) / First Hires (2-10) / Early Scale (~25) / Growth (~50-150) / Scaled (150+) -->


---

**What does good look like at this stage?**
<!-- When this process is working well, what does it look like in practice? -->


**What should you actually do?**
<!-- What are the concrete things to set up, decide, or put in place?
     What did you do? What would you do differently? -->


**What breaks or goes wrong?**
<!-- Red flags that the process is missing or broken.
     Mistakes founders make. Things you learned the hard way.
     What breaks when you skip this? -->
<!-- These are the hardest things to find anywhere else — please be specific here if you can. -->


**How does this change as the company grows?**
<!-- What changes once you have more people or more revenue?
     What stops working at 30 people that worked at 5? -->


**Tools or resources you've found useful?**


**Any caveats or context?**
<!-- Only true for VC-backed? Only applies in the Netherlands? Only relevant for SaaS?
     Anything you're uncertain about? -->


---
*You don't need a GitHub account to contribute — a maintainer can add your experience on your behalf if you send it by email or DM. See [wiki-pipeline/contributions/HOW-TO-CONTRIBUTE.md](../../wiki-pipeline/contributions/HOW-TO-CONTRIBUTE.md) for other options.*
